title: Ennai Thalaatta Varuvaalo Lyrics Kadhalukku Mariyadhai
stanzas:
Ennai thaalaatta varuvaalo
nenjil poo manajm tharuvalo
thanga thaeraattam varuvaalo
illai yemaatram tharuvaalo

thaththalikkum maname
thaththai varuvaalaa
mottu idhazha
mutham ondru tharuvaalaa?

Ennai thaalaatta varuvaalo
nenjil poo manajm tharuvalo
thanga thaeraattam varuvaalo
illai yemaatram tharuvaalo

Poovizhi paarvaiyil minnal kaatinaal.
aayiram aasaigal ennil oottinaal.
yaeno yaeno nenjai pootinaal

iravum pagalum ennai vaatinaal
idhayam aval peyaril maatrinaal
kadhal theeyai vandhu mootinaal

naan kaetkum
padhil ingu vaaraadhaa
naan thoonga
madi ondru thaaraadhaa
raagangal thaabangal theeraadhaa
thaalangal raagangal seraadhaa

enadhu iravu aval koondhalil
enadhu pagalgal aval paarvaiyil
kaalam ellaam aval kaadhalil

kanavu kalaiya villai kangalil
idhayam thudikkavillai aasaiyil
vazhvum thalvum aval vaarthaiyil

kannukkul imaiyaaga irukindraal
nenjukul isaiyaaga thudikindraal
naalaiku naan kaana varuvaalo
paalaiku neerootri povaalo

Ennai thaalaatta varuvaalo
nenjil poo manajm tharuvalo
thanga thaeraattam varuvaalo
illai yemaatram tharuvaalo

thaththalikkum maname
thaththai varuvaalaa
mottu idhazha
mutham ondru tharuvaalaa?

Ennai thaalaatta varuvaalo
varuvaalo..
nenjil poo manajm tharuvalo
 tharuvalo..
thanga thaeraattam varuvaalo
varuvaalo..
illai yemaatram tharuvaalo
tharuvaalo..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ennai Thalaatta Varuvaalo expresses deep feelings of love and yearning, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the film Kadhalukku Mariyadhai, which is known for its beautiful music and romantic storyline.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan, whose voice adds a unique charm to the melody.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Ennai Thalaatta Varuvaalo was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja, a legendary figure in Tamil cinema music.

When was this song released?

This beautiful track was released on December 19, 1997, and has since become a classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennai Thalaatta Varuvaalo, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions and longing for his beloved, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song beautifully captures the essence of love, with its soothing melody and poignant lyrics. Set against the backdrop of Kadhalukku Mariyadhai, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration of Hariharan's soulful voice and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Thalaatta Varuvaalo is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the soulful voice of Hariharan. This enchanting track from the classic film Kadhalukku Mariyadhai, composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, resonates with deep emotions and nostalgia. Experience the magic of this timeless song that continues to touch hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: Will someone come to comfort me? Will a flower bloom in my heart? Will the golden dance come to me or will it only be given to me?
Will my heart be at peace? Will it give me a kiss?
I am asking for a little patience...
Will someone come to comfort me? Will a flower bloom in my heart? Will the golden dance come to me or will it only be given to me?
When I see your eyes, it's like lightning strikes. A thousand desires are fulfilled in me. Why, oh why, does it fill my heart?
Day and night, if I am embraced, my heart changes with her name, and love comes like fire.
Will the answer I seek not come here? Will I not find a place to rest? Will the melodies and rhythms not come together?
I am looking at the path with my eyes...
My night is in her curls, my days are in her gaze, all time is in her love.
If dreams are not fulfilled, the heart does not beat in the eyes, life and death are in her words.
If she is in my eyes, will she sing in my heart? Will I come tomorrow or will I go to the river of milk?
I am looking at the path with my eyes...
Will someone come to comfort me? Will a flower bloom in my heart? Will the golden dance come to me or will it only be given to me?
Will my heart be at peace? Will it give me a kiss?
Will someone come to comfort me? Will someone come to comfort me? Will a flower bloom in my heart? Will the golden dance come to me or will it only be given to me?
